title: Traefik Entrypoint Open Connections
app: Splunk Universal Forwarder, Splunk Connect for Syslog, or HTTP Event Collector; `props.conf`/`transforms.conf` for listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=proxy sourcetype="traefik:metrics"
| search metric_name="*entrypoint*open_connections*" OR match(metric_name, "traefik_entrypoint_open_connections")
| eval v=tonumber(metric_value)
| timechart span=1m max(v) by entrypoint
description: Connection growth predicts fds and memory pressure.
implementation: Enable `--metrics.prometheus`; label series by entrypoint. Use OTel if multi-tenant.
visualization: Time series for rates and latency, top/dedup for hotspots, single-value alerts on health thresholds.
grandmaExplanation: We watch traefik entrypoint open connections and catch issues early, before they turn into outages for the people who rely on the network.
knownFalsePositives: Edge cases: multi-vendor mixes and ad hoc feeds can include lab traffic and partial visibility that mimics issues until scopes are defined. Tuning tip: match this to «Traefik Entrypoint Open Connections» and exclude change windows, scans, and lab VLANs you already expect.
